rationale: TestWorkersPanel_LiveTransitions covers all 7 AC: subprocess worker re-execs and POSTs to /api/workers/register, GraphQL query asserts connected/stale/disconnected via injected synthetic clock (setNow on shared adapter); no wall-clock sleep past thresholds.

findings.summary: Probe interval is treated as 30s (60s=2x, 300s=10x), matching ADR-022 rev 5; clock seam added on adapter rather than worker_ingest.go but functionally equivalent.
Subprocess exits after registration; freshness transitions are driven solely by synthetic clock — appropriate since the test exercises freshness logic, not liveness pings.
